mapper.select: SELECT T1.REQUEST_KEY AS CUST_REQ_SEQ , T1.CRET_IP AS RIP , T1.AMD_DT AS RVISN_DTTM , T1.AMD_ID AS RVISN_ID , T1.CANCEL_MOBILE_NO AS CANCEL_MOBILE_NO , T1.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM , NULL AS ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , T1.AUTH_INFO AS ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , T2.CSTMR_NM AS CSTMR_NAME , T2.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO || T2.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM_NO || T2.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO AS RECEIVE_MOBILE_NO , T1.BENEFIT_AGREE_YN AS BENEFIT_AGREE_FLAG , T1.CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN AS CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_FLAG , T1.ETC_AGREE_YN AS ETC_AGREE_FLAG , NULL AS SURVEY1_CD , NULL AS SURVEY1_TEXT , NULL AS SURVEY2_CD , NULL AS SURVEY2_TEXT , NULL AS SURVEY_SCORE , NULL AS SURVEY_SUGGESTION , T1.MEMO AS MEMO , T1.REG_DATE AS SYS_RDATE_DD , T1.REGST_ID AS REGST_ID , T1.REG_DT AS REGST_DTTM , T1.PROC_CD AS PROC_CD , T1.SCAN_ID AS SCAN_ID FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL T1 INNER JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR T2 ON T2.REQUEST_KEY = T1.REQUEST_KEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND T2.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

SELECT T1.REQUEST_KEY AS REQUEST_KEY , T2.CRET_DT AS SYS_RDATE , T2.AMD_DT AS RVISN_DTTM , T2.AMD_ID AS RVISN_ID , T2.CSTMR_NM AS CSTMR_NAME , T2.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , T2.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME AS CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME , T2.CSTMR_PRIVATE_BIZ_NO AS CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VISA_NO AS VISA_CD , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VDATE_START_DATE AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_VDATE_END_DATE AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE , T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD , T2.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME , T2.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN , T2.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIZ_NO AS CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER , T2.UPJN_CD AS UPJN_CD , T2.BCU_SBST AS BCU_SBST , T2.CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE_CD AS CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE , NULL AS FATH_MOBILE_FN , NULL AS FATH_MOBILE_MN , NULL AS FATH_MOBILE_RN , 'Y' AS SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , NULL AS SELF_CERT_TYPE , NULL AS SELF_CSTMR_CI , T1.IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE AS SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , T1.SELF_ISSU_NO AS SELF_ISSU_NUM , T2.CSTMR_TEL_FN_NO AS CSTMR_TEL_FN , T2.CSTMR_TEL_MN_NO AS CSTMR_TEL_MN , T2.CSTMR_TEL_RN_NO AS CSTMR_TEL_RN , T2.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN_NO AS CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , T2.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN_NO AS CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , T2.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN_NO AS CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , T2.CSTMR_ZIPCD AS CSTMR_POST , T2.CSTMR_ADR AS CSTMR_ADDR , T2.CSTMR_ADR_DTL AS CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , T2.CSTMR_ADR_BJD AS CSTMR_ADDR_BJD , NULL AS CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , T2.CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR AS CSTMR_MAIL , T2.CSTMR_EMAIL_RECEIVE_YN AS CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG , T2.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , T2.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM_NO AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM , T2.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , NULL AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG , NULL AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM , NULL AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN , NULL AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION , NULL AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM , NULL AS PRNTS_CTN , NULL AS CSTMR_JEJU_ID , NULL AS RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD , NULL AS RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL T1 INNER JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR T2 ON T2.REQUEST_KEY = T1.REQUEST_KEY WHERE T1.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND T2.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
